mapper.insert: INSERT INTO save_for_later (user_id, product_id, quantity, price_snapshot) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{priceSnapshot})
mapper.update: UPDATE save_for_later SET quantity = #{quantity}, price_snapshot = #{priceSnapshot} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM save_for_later WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
SELECT * FROM save_for_later WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM save_for_later WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}

DELETE FROM save_for_later WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id IN
#{pid}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM save_for_later WHERE user_id = #{userId}
